name: Exact Cr'edit Repair Economics
description_short: The Credit People offers credit repair services in Memphis with dispute filing, credit report analysis, and personalized expert guidance to remove inaccurate negative items.
description_long:
The Credit People is a credit repair service operating under the brand serving the Memphis, Tennessee area with a focus on helping consumers navigate credit report errors and negative items. The company positions itself as an alternative to DIY credit repair, leveraging over 20 years of claimed experience in the industry. They maintain a live team of credit experts available during business hours (starting at 9 AM) to provide consultation and case management. The service appears to operate through a phone-based model, with a primary contact number (801-758-5525) and online intake system for potential clients. What distinguishes The Credit People is their emphasis on educational content and transparency about consumer rights under federal (FCRA, CROA) and Tennessee state law. Their website provides extensive guides on credit fundamentals, dispute processes, and legal protections rather than high-pressure sales tactics. They offer free credit report pulls and analysis before any service agreement. The company explicitly mentions compliance with the Credit Repair Organizations Act prohibition on upfront fees, suggesting legitimate operating practices. An honest assessment reveals this is a standard credit repair operation competing on experience and educational positioning rather than unique methodology. The website lacks specific pricing information, success rate data, or client testimonials, making cost-benefit evaluation difficult. The reliance on phone consultation and live agent availability may appeal to consumers wanting personalized guidance but could create accessibility challenges for those preferring digital self-service options.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free credit report pull and analysis before committing to services
Over 20 years of claimed industry experience in credit dispute handling
Explicitly complies with CROA prohibition on upfront fees
Provides comprehensive educational content on FCRA, CROA, and Tennessee consumer rights
Live expert availability during business hours (9 AM start) for direct consultation
Offers written contracts detailing consumer rights and three-day cancellation period
Emphasizes certified mail documentation and record-keeping best practices
cons: No transparent pricing information available on website
No published success rates, client testimonials, or case outcome data
Limited online accessibility—primarily phone-based service model may exclude digital-first consumers
Website URL suggests affiliation with thecreditpeople.com but company name is 'Exact Cr'edit Repair Economics' per assignment, creating potential confusion about entity identity
No information on timeline guarantees or realistic expectations despite guide mentioning 'credit repair timeline'
best_for: Memphis residents with documented errors on credit reports who prefer phone-based expert guidance
Consumers unfamiliar with dispute procedures and wanting step-by-step professional handling
Those who need help navigating Tennessee-specific credit regulations and consumer protections
diagnosis: The Credit People is best for Memphis residents who want professional dispute handling and lack confidence or time to navigate credit repair independently, particularly those with clear credit report errors. The main caveat is the complete absence of pricing transparency, success metrics, and outcome guarantees, making it impossible to assess value before contacting by phone.
services: Free credit report pull and analysis from all three bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Credit score and credit report review by expert consultants
Identification of inaccurate negative items and errors
Dispute filing with credit bureaus on behalf of clients
Dispute filing with data furnishers (original creditors)
Written service contracts with three-day cancellation rights
Guidance on collections, charge-offs, and late payment resolution strategies
Credit building and maintenance strategy recommendations
Documentation and certified mail support for dispute correspondence
Personalized credit improvement goal setting and 90-day milestone tracking
Legal rights education under FCRA, CROA, and Tennessee consumer protection law
Non-profit credit counseling referrals in Memphis area
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2500 Mt Moriah Rd h250, Memphis, TN 38115
meta_description: The Credit People offers credit repair services in Memphis with dispute filing and personalized guidance to remove negative items.
